top_signals.title: Oil prices fall after Trump signs deal to end Iran war
top_signals.summary: Oil declines as Mideast peace prospects rise following U.S.-Iran deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Crypto-Treasury Dream Unravels After a 90% Stock Plunge
top_signals.summary: The business model of launching a public company to buy crypto is falling apart. As a result, those in the queue to do so through blank-check companies are facing pressure from investors against a market backdrop that is fiercely unfriendly.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto’s Oyu Tolgoi resumes exports after Mongolia blockade
top_signals.summary: Shipments returned to normal one day after protesters disrupted transport from Mongolia's flagship copper mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, continuing to cool after three-day rally
top_signals.summary: Investor bullishness showed signs of waning on Wednesday, as shares sank 5%.
